channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This vehicle has flat tyres and has been parked in residents carpark bay for 3 months now, it appears to be abandoned., 29th March
item.description:
This silver/grey Hyundai car appears to be abandoned. The tyres are flat and it has been parked in the residents bay for 3 months now. The vehicle is parked in the carpark opposite the garages on the right.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Flytipping is happening at the pavement in front Milford mews. A old woman is dumping a black bag with Corex board and paint material

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sensor on traffic light, 29th March
item.description:
I have been working in the Charlton area for close to six months now and the traffic light on Bugsby’s way that you can right turn into Asda petrol garage at I believe the sensor is broken that picks up cars waiting. The reason I think this is traffic builds all the way back waiting to turn and the light only ever changes after 5-6 minutes letting traffic constantly flow from other directions this is causing people to go through a red light which is obviously a safety concern in itself I feel like this needs to be looked into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bugsby's Way, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle with false number plate, no longer registered with DVLA, 29th March
item.description:
MOT history indicates the registration number KO04 KBE was for a Vauxhall Meriva, MOT expired since Feb 2016, but this vehicle is a Nissan Micra. Checking DVLA's site indicates the registration not found, hence not taxed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fearon Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillage in Bournewood Road, 29th March
item.description:
Spillage of various matters needs clearing roadside outside house number 1A Bournewood Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haydens Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The mini van has been parked in the car park used for residents for more than 6 months now., 29th March
item.description:
The Mini van has been parked in the car park for more than 6 months now, it's parked in a bay, that is used by residents infront of the gates in the car park located next to the recycling bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Construction waist storage dangerously can fall and injur somebody, Construction waist blocking footpath, BOSTALL LANE 31

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow tree in need of pruning, 29th March
item.description:
The willow tree next to electrical storage area beside Rotunda Court requires pruning as it blocks street lights to bin area belonging to Rotunda Court residents. Bin area as a consequence is poorly lit at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pike Close, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 29th March
item.description:
Fly tipping mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report of Fly-Tipping: Large Mattress on Hatherley Crescent DA14 4JA, 29th March
item.description:
​I am writing to report an incident of fly-tipping that occurred today, [Insert Date 29.03.2026], at approximately 5pm- 8pm on Hatherley Crescent (opposite bus station H). ​A large mattress has been dumped on the green lawn (council-owned land) adjacent to my property. I have attached a photograph of the item for your reference. ​As this has been left directly outside my residence, I want to formally log that this was not disposed of by me, and I would appreciate it if the council could arrange for its removal as soon as possible to prevent further dumping in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aftermath of party, 29th March
item.description:
Litter Horrible aftermath of boozy gathering. Ice is only partially melted so it’s recent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins always left on pavement., 29th March
item.description:
Bins are always left on the pavement. Never taking in. Can make it tricky navigated withour kids.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ickburgh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins are always on the pavement., 29th March
item.description:
Bins are always on the pavement. General public starts using them as a bin. Bin men haven't emptied recently, probably as overflowing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ickburgh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin outside Sainsbury's overflowing and rubbish blown all over the pavement., 29th March
item.description:
The pavement between Churchfields Road and Sidney Road is forever littered with detritus. This is a constant problem. It is unsightly and unpleasant to walk on every day. The litter problem gives this busy residential area a filthy feel. Please could a permanent solution be found. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lift workers leftovers, 29th March
item.description:
5th floor. Leftover from workers fixing lift. Been 6 weeks now. Lift is working so think they are done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wardrobes, 29th March
item.description:
Weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A sofa has been dumped on Cole Street, 29th March
item.description:
A sofa has been dumped on Cole Street - initially it was just the dumping. Now it is being used by students in the area to sit and drink on. So not only is it rubbish it but now it's allowing for anti-social/drinking behaviour. It is too big to take to the dump by ourselves or we would.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Cole Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on 1st floor and down to ground floor, 29th March
item.description:
Builders have left broken glass and not bothered to tidy up after themselves

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv and pram, 29th March
item.description:
TV on the grass between Kingsholm and Brenley Gdns. Pram on the grass opposite 32 Kingsholm Gdns

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsholm Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large boxes and sofas on Graham Rd, 29th March
item.description:
Very large cardboard boxes and old sofas dumped on Graham Road, A1207, on the corner with Royal Oak Rd. Blocking much of the pavement. Thanks for fixing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
